items.title: Yusuf Pathan to quit TMC? Mamata loyalist blames Amit Shah for 'breaking' party, says very happy that...: 10 points
items.summary: TMC leader Kalyan Banerjee confirmed that TMC MP Yusuf Pathan will meet Amit Shah in Delhi.  Another MP Mahua Moitra accused Pathan of travelling to Delhi following Home Minister Amit Shah's line.

items.title: Mamata loyalist Kalyan slams TMC rebels—‘want to see how they face our party workers after joining BJP’
items.summary: TMC MP who has stood steadfast behind Mamata since rebellion broke out ridicules fellow legislator Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar’s claims, says ‘good riddance’ to those who want to quit party.

items.title: Haunted by 2020, Congress flies Madhya Pradesh MLAs to Karnataka before Rajya Sabha vote
Bengal restores general consent for CBI to investigate central government employees
items.summary: The Mamata Banerjee-led government had withdrawn the permission in 2018, alleging that the Centre was misusing the agency for political vendetta.

items.title: At Opposition meeting, a very tough question was asked about Cockroaches
Donald Trump’s $100,000 H-1B visa fee is unlawful, US judge rules
items.summary: The court held that the fee amounted to an unlawful tax that Congress had not authorised.

items.title: Right of passage: Kirit Somaiya evolves from anti-corruption crusader to BJP’s poster boy in Maharashtra
items.summary: Gone are the RTIs and video releases against the allegedly corrupt; the former Lok Sabha MP has turned hard right on causes like ‘land jihad’ and namaz on the roads.

items.title: Mamata meets Sonia: Poll setbacks, hugs and old fault lines in Congress-TMC ties explained
items.summary: Mamata Banerjee met Sonia Gandhi on Tuesday, a day after a photograph of the two leaders sharing a warm embrace drew attention for the striking contrast it presented to the often fraught relationship between the Congress and the TMC.

items.title: Deve Gowda left out, Congress decries ‘humiliation’: What Rajya Sabha snub means for JD(U)-BJP ties
items.summary: On Monday, BJP nominates M Nagaraja, a member of the Kuruba community, instead of Deve Gowda, as its Rajya Sabha choice from Karnataka on last day of nomination filing.

items.title: TMC's numbers game: How many MPs, MLAs turned against Mamata — and will it boost BJP's strength in Parliament?
items.summary: As discontent within a substantial section of the TMC and signs of internal cracks come into focus, here's a look at how the numbers could stack up in Parliament and the state Assembly if party leaders rebel.

items.title: One-way traffic in TMC, had been thinking of resigning since RG Kar—Sukhendu Sekhar Ray tells ThePrint
items.summary: In a press note issued soon after resigning from post of TMC Rajya Sabha MP, Ray praises BJP government in Bengal saying it has has started working as promised in poll manifesto.

items.title: INDIA bloc demands Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan’s resignation
items.summary: He presided over the ‘betrayal’ of youth who took the NEET and the CBSE exams, the alliance alleged.

items.title: Letter to CJI on SIR & education minister’s scalp over NEET: INDIA bloc’s 5-pt resolution after meet
items.summary: Alliance unanimously agreed on five key decisions aimed at strengthening opposition coordination and raising issues that require urgent govt attention, says Congress chief.

items.summary: Kharge said the next formal meeting of the INDIA bloc leaders has been locked in for 8 August, adding that the opposition bloc will meet once every two months from now on.

items.title: Sukhendu’s exit deepens TMC unrest, rebel leader Ritabrata claims more MPs set to break ranks
items.summary: While Mamata attended INDIA bloc meet, around a dozen dissident TMC MPs reportedly gathered at Union minister Bhupender Yadav's residence. CM Suvendu Adhikari was also paid a brief visit.

items.title: Sukhendu Sekhar Ray takes aim at TMC after resigning as RS MP—’they believed no one could touch them’
items.summary: After giving up primary membership of TMC, Ray criticised the party over the RG Kar rape-murder case, saying the state leadership had become disconnected from ground realities.

items.title: At INDIA bloc meet, Kharge flags economy, jobs, exam mismanagement; calls for opposition unity
items.summary: The Congress chief also pointed out to the ‘complete mismanagement’ of the examination system due to which the hopes and aspirations of lakhs of youth are being betrayed.

items.title: INDIA bloc meeting underway in shadow of a crumbling Trinamool, absent DMK. AAP stays away too
items.summary: Setting the stage, Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge said that rising prices are impacting ordinary citizens, also criticising the government over recent examination paper leaks.

items.title: Crucial INDIA bloc meeting underway in Delhi; Rahul, Kharge, Mamata, Omar, Left leaders present
items.summary: Congress leaders Sonia Gandhi & KC Venugopal, Samajwadi Party chief Akhilesh Yadav, and Bihar Leader of Opposition Tejasvi Yadav also arrived for the meeting.

items.title: TMC leader Sukhendu Sekhar Ray resigns as Rajya Sabha MP, quits party

items.title: Tamil Nadu: TVK government may not last three months, says DMK chief MK Stalin

items.title: Ashok Gehlot breaks silence on Sachin Pilot: ‘I facilitated his rise, but he never acknowledged it’
items.summary: Ex-CM Gehlot took to X and claimed that he played a pivotal role in Sachin Pilot's ascent to the Union Cabinet. Expressing deep personal hurt, Gehlot noted that despite his active efforts to secure a ministerial berth for Pilot, the latter never publicly acknowledged the support.

items.title: Meeting with Shah, litti-chokha diplomacy—why BJP laid out red carpet for Nepal’s ruling RSP
items.summary: From Ayodhya, Janakpur & Lumbini to party HQ in Delhi, BJP’s banking on political engagement, cultural affinity & people-to-people links to reset ties with Nepal.

items.title: Who ‘destroyed’ the INDIA bloc? JD(U) leader Sanjay Jha names two former chief ministers
items.summary: In an interview, Jha, known as close confidant of Nitish Kumar, claimed that a broad agreement had been reached within the Opposition alliance on elevating Kumar to the post, but the move was thwarted during a key meeting held in Patna in June 2023.

items.title: Crucial INDIA bloc meeting in Delhi today: Who’s attending and what’s on the agenda?
items.summary: The meeting comes close on the heels of electoral setbacks for two key regional players—the DMK and the TMC—amid reports of growing differences within the Opposition alliance over a range of issues. The DMK and AAP will not attend the meeting.

items.summary: The resignations came amid a period of upheaval within the Trinamool Congress after the Bharatiya Janata Party’s victory in the West Bengal Assembly elections.

items.summary: Kakade's poll affidavit shows a Rs 10 cr 'loan' to Jay Pawar, which he says was an advance for a property. NCP spokesperson says there is transparency in their business dealings.

items.summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin pushed back at prospects for European leaders to help negotiate an end to his war in Ukraine, dismissing them as mediators and pointedly insisting on a peace deal he said had been worked out with Donald Trump in Alaska.

items.title: Rebel faction’s LoP ‘accepted’, but can Speaker delve into TMC rift? What Sena split aftermath suggests
items.summary: Rebel MLA Ritabrata has claimed that more than 2/3rd of party’s MLAs submitted LoP pick ‘which has been accepted’. Experts say that the Speaker has to go by who the TMC has nominated.
